title: Pvp Optimizer
description: This mod-pack is focused on your smooth pvp experience
body:
# PVP OPTIMIZER - SMOOTH PVP EXPIERENCE

The PVP OPTIMIZER Modpack is made to give players a real advantage in Minecraft PvP. It works great on version 1.21.1 and many others, helping you fight better in every match. Whether you're dueling on servers or playing competitive matches, it makes your gameplay smoother and boosts your FPS. 

### FEATURES❤️‍🔥
**PVP optimized**⚡
This mod is fully pvp optimized into enjoyable lag-free expierence

**Server compability** 
This modpack is fully optimized for a popular pvp server's like:
flowpvp, Mcclub, Minemen etc and competitive modes like:
Mctiers, Subtiers, Ranked.

**Better fps**
This modpack is optimized with performance boosting mod's that improve your expierence mods like sodium, lithium, Krypton
### WHO IS THIS FOR?❓

Pvp player who want smooth expierence

Anyone playing modern-pvp server

Player with low, mid-end pc

### DOWNLOAD & INSTALLATION🛜

If you want to convert modrinth modpack file (mrpack) into zip, you can do this below

**CLICK HERE: [MRPACK TO ZIP CONVERTER](https://mrpacktozip.playdown.in/)**


### **INCLUDED MODS**💻

Sodium & Sodium Extra

Lithium & Krypton

FerriteCore & ImmediatelyFast

BadOptimizations

More Culling & Clumps

Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)

spark (Performance Profiler)

AppleSkin

BetterHitreg

Shield Fixes & Shield Status

TotemCounter

Dynamic Crosshair

Status Effect Timer

uku's Armor HUD

Gamma Utils (Fullbright)

Shulker Box Tooltip

Better Mount HUD

Better Ping Display

Better Statistics Screen 

BetterGrassify

Borderless Fullscreen

Capes, Chat Heads, & EnchantmentDescriptions

Entity Model Features & Entity Texture Features

Simple Voice Chat

Fabric API & Fabric Language Kotlin

Architectury & Cloth Config v20

Mod Menu & Searchables

Placeholder API, TCDCommons API, ukulib, Walksy Lib, & MaLiLib
